summary: Full-stack testing of EduTech LMS MVP. All 18 backend tests pass after fixing one bug. Frontend UI and all critical flows are working correctly.

minor.issue: After insert_one, cert dict was mutated with ObjectId `_id` which is not JSON serializable → caused 500. FIXED by calling cert.pop('_id', None) before return.

issues: Total Revenue shows ₹0K because no payments have been recorded (expected behavior with seed data — no paid invoices)

critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 835 lines — acceptable but nearing limit. Consider splitting into route modules.
Brute-force lockout after 5 failed logins is NOT implemented (playbook requirement). Login endpoint has no rate limiting.
httpOnly cookie `secure=False` — acceptable for dev but should be True in production with HTTPS.
CORS_ORIGINS in .env is `*` but code uses FRONTEND_URL properly — no issue.
Complete student endpoint was returning ObjectId in cert response (FIXED).
seed_data_creation: Backend tests created TEST_Student and test enquiries; these persist in DB.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core flows tested and working: login, dashboard KPIs+charts, CRM Kanban 5 columns, add enquiry form, academic hub 3 tabs, finance invoicing, student list+search, student profile 4 tabs, all lifecycle buttons visible. One backend bug fixed (ObjectId in complete endpoint). No brute-force lockout implemented.
rca_of_issue: POST /api/students/{id}/complete: `await db.certificates.insert_one(cert)` mutates the `cert` dict in-place by adding `_id` as a pymongo ObjectId. The subsequent `return {'certificate': cert}` fails JSON serialization. Fix: call `cert.pop('_id', None)` before returning.
